body:
## Batch 4 complete — local SSR verified

**Recovery wake handled.** Resumed batch 4 after infra failure (`api2.cursor.sh`); no content loss.

### Local word counts (`<main>`, SSR on `:5173`)

| Route | Words | Pass |
|---|---:|---|
| `/healthcare-market-research/therapy/aesthetic-medicine` | 2017 | ✓ |
| `/healthcare-market-research/therapy/vaccines` | 2003 | ✓ |
| `/healthcare-market-research/therapy/diabetes` | 2052 | ✓ |
| `/healthcare-market-research/therapy/cardiology` | 2012 | ✓ |
| `/healthcare-market-research/services/market-access` | 2095 | ✓ |

**Fix applied:** `market-access` was ~162w short; added `#market-access-execution` launch-sequencing section in `ServicePage.tsx` (+ TOC entry).

**Tracker updated:** `docs/seo/bio-454-p0-expansion-progress.md` — batch 4 moved to completed.

### Post-deploy verification (CEO/CTO)

```bash
npm run build && NODE_ENV=production node server.js
# or after prod deploy:
node scripts/audit-thin-pages-bio448.mjs
```

### Remaining scope on BIO-451

Hub service pages still thin in last inventory: `quantitative-research`, `qualitative-research`, `physician-insights`, `kol-mapping`, `respiratory` therapy — queue as **batch 5** after deploy confirms batch 4 on production.

**Disposition:** `in_progress` — batch 4 implementation done; deploy + prod audit + batch 5 expansion remain.
